subject: TurboScribe updates: Faster uploads 🔥, file management tools 📁, audio restoration 🪄, and more!
body:
Hi Denys,

Welcome to another edition of TurboScribe's product updates!

We've been hard at work on quality-of-life and performance improvements. TurboScribe was already fast, and now it's even faster! Let's dive right in!

🔥 Faster, More Reliable Uploads

We've optimized the file upload service to increase upload speeds and reliability. Upload speeds are now about 20% faster.

Preprocessing speeds (a step that takes place after upload but before transcription) are now about 10x faster. This is particularly noticeable for larger files greater than 200MB in size. Larger 5GB uploads (which used to take several minutes to process) now get processed about 100x faster in only a few seconds ⚡, so your large files start transcribing right away.

Lastly, in the event that your upload in interrupted (e.g. due to a poor connection), we'll now automatically retry your upload up to 3 times. Overall, these improvements have reduced failed uploads by over 80% 🚀.

⏰ Export with Section Timestamps

You can now export PDF, DOCX, and TXT transcripts with section timestamps using the new "Advanced Export" tool. Simply click "Advanced Export" and then check "Section Timestamps". This option also works when using Bulk Actions to export multiple files at the same time.

📁 Export Folders

You can now export all transcripts in a folder (up to 1,000 transcripts) at a time. Simply choose "Export Folder" while viewing the contents of any folder and choose your export formats.

⌚ Timecode Support

If you're uploading audio or video files with timecode metadata (common in video production scenarios), TurboScribe automatically detects and adjusts the timestamps in transcripts to align with the provided SMPTE timecode metadata.

🎥 New Audio & Video Formats

We've expanded our supported audio & video formats to several up-and-coming formats and codecs, including RKA, Radiance, SC-4, APAC, VQC, WavArc, and enhanced support for AV1-encoded video files.

🪄 Audio Restoration Tool

If you're working with files with low audio quality, the new audio restoration tool uses AI to remove background noise and enhance speech. Enabling this feature (under "More Settings" when uploading files) is only recommended for files with extremely poor audio quality. Audio restoration takes an extra 2-3 minutes per hour of audio/video.

📁 New Folder Sort Options

You can now order the transcripts in your folders by filename or upload time.

You can also now view any uncategorized files (files that aren't in any folders) with the new Uncategorized shortcut.

👥 What People Are Saying

  • "...the quality of the transcripts are totally awesome, and I don't understand how the accuracy can be so high and still also transcribing so quickly." — Rasmus from Norway 🇳🇴
  • "TurboScribe has been such a game-changer for me... I'm transcribing all sorts of business interactions—meetings, calls, videos, you name it. Since switching to TurboScribe - I transcribe everything without thinking. Large numbers of small files or several HUGE files it handles it. It saved me money, enabled me to offer more services and a TON of time. My once a year review is done, but I feel Turboscribe deserves is hands down." — Gerardo from Australia 🇦🇺
  • "We're using to transcribe medical reports with rare terms. Very impressed by the speed and quality." — Jules from France 🇫🇷
  • "Easily the best AI transcription service I've used. Intuitive, quick, and super helpful features for anyone with a high volume workload." — Eric from United States 🇺🇸
  • Kevin Stratvert recently reviewed TurboScribe on his YouTube channel. Watch Best Speech to Text AI.

More

  • TurboScribe Unlimited, Explained: What's included in TurboScribe Unlimited? A deep dive into Unlimited features.
  • Security and Privacy FAQ: Learn more about how TurboScribe keeps your data safe and secure.

Thanks for tuning in for today's updates! You can try all these features and improvements by visiting your dashboard.

If you have any questions, you can email me at leif@turboscribe.ai or simply reply to this email.

Happy transcribing!

--
Leif Foged
leif@turboscribe.ai
TurboScribe - Unlimited audio & video transcription
